name: HomeBox
description: An inventory and organization system built for the home user
compose:
name: slashnode-homebox
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/sysadminsmedia/homebox:0.26.2
    container_name: homebox
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      HBOX_LOG_LEVEL: info
      HBOX_LOG_FORMAT: text
      HBOX_WEB_MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE: '10'
      HBOX_AUTH_API_KEY_PEPPER: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - web_data:/data/
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7745:7745
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-homebox_web_data
